title: RIP Claude Fable, open-source AI unleashed, full body avatars, new Google models, new TTS: AI NEWS
summary: AI Search presents a news roundup covering GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, and Claude Fable along with new tools for avatars, translation, and text-to-speech. The video reviews emerging models and techniques across vision, language, and diffusion domains. Multiple open-source and closed systems are discussed including Gemini models and various research projects.
writeup: AI Search runs a news roundup spanning new and updated models including GLM 5.2, Kimi K2.7, MiniMax M3, Claude Fable, and Gemini, alongside tooling for 3D and full-body avatars, live translation, and text-to-speech. The roundup matters because it tracks releases across vision, language, and diffusion domains while contrasting open-source and closed systems. Recurring technical threads include test-time compute, sparse attention, diffusion models, and video generation. Several research projects are reviewed in addition to the named model releases.
